name: flowcraft
description: Production-grade Go SDK for building AI agents with long-term memory, knowledge retrieval, and voice — runnable as a library, a daemon, or a real-time pipeline.
summaryZh: Production-grade Go SDK for building AI agents with long-term memory, knowledge retrieval, and voice — runnable as a library, a daemon, or a real-time pipeline. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
